title: Commentaries by who
wikitext:
[]: Commentaries by who??             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 22, 2007 5:19 pm This has been bothering me for awhile: Who did the commentary for the Renewal booklets and Refrian of Evangelion CD booklet? For the latter, I want to almost say Sadamoto (and if that's the case, yay. He said some REALLY good things in that song booklet! Now if only he could make those manga deadlines and such... *sigh*) I guess I'm curious in terms of the Renewal booklet commentary because of their more or less outright stating that EoTV is NOT concurrent when considering the fact: 1) It clearly is. And, in my view, literally. (to an extent, as some things are possible flashbacks or don't occur at the exact same time) 2) I thought GAINAX intentionally didn't say things eitherway as the Concurrency and Gainax thread seemed to show? Thanks!

[]: Re: Commentaries by who??             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 22, 2007 7:37 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: This has been bothering me for awhile: Who did the commentary for the Renewal booklets and Refrian of Evangelion CD booklet?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 22, 2007 9:00 pm I wrote: For the latter, I want to almost say Sadamoto Reichu wrote: Why?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 22, 2007 9:13 pm Sadamoto didn't even design Zeruel, you know.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 22, 2007 9:27 pm Ah, okie-doke. My brain went=Character Designer=everything instead of Character Designer/=/everything (yes, that probably made no sense.)

Article: Commentaries by who
[]: Commentaries by who??             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 22, 2007 5:19 pm This has been bothering me for awhile: Who did the commentary for the Renewal booklets and Refrian of Evangelion CD booklet? For the latter, I want to almost say Sadamoto (and if that's the case, yay. He said some REALLY good things in that song booklet! Now if only he could make those manga deadlines and such... *sigh*) I guess I'm curious in terms of the Renewal booklet commentary because of their more or less outright stating that EoTV is NOT concurrent when considering the fact: 1) It clearly is. And, in my view, literally. (to an extent, as some things are possible flashbacks or don't occur at the exact same time) 2) I thought GAINAX intentionally didn't say things eitherway as the Concurrency and Gainax thread seemed to show? Thanks!

[]: Re: Commentaries by who??             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 22, 2007 7:37 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: This has been bothering me for awhile: Who did the commentary for the Renewal booklets and Refrian of Evangelion CD booklet?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 22, 2007 9:00 pm I wrote: For the latter, I want to almost say Sadamoto Reichu wrote: Why?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 22, 2007 9:13 pm Sadamoto didn't even design Zeruel, you know.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 22, 2007 9:27 pm Ah, okie-doke. My brain went=Character Designer=everything instead of Character Designer/=/everything (yes, that probably made no sense.)
